violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black and pink residue. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
Hot water was not available at handwashing sink during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
Active leak was observed by door from ceiling. The physical facilities to be in good repair.. Service was called during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026

Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Dishes removed from hand sink at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

Wood is used in the construction of behind the handwashing sink. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Establishment is to remove wood, or cover it using a smooth, durable, and easily cleanable material. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2024
